Headline: #56 Milwaukee Temporary Northbound Reroute near Milwaukee/Oakley
ShortDescription: Northbound 56 Milwaukee buses are temporarily rerouted via Milwaukee, Damen, Armitage and Milwaukee: due to, street blockage near Milwaukee/Oakley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Northbound #56 Milwaukee buses are temporarily rerouted via Milwaukee, Damen, Armitage, Milwaukee and over regular route, due to street blockage near Milwaukee/Oakley.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: O'Hare-bound Blue Line Service Delayed at Harlem (O'Hare)
ShortDescription: O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing at Harlem (O'Hare) due to police activity.  Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing at Harlem (O'Hare) due to police activity. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
